Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 28 

BENE_PRMRY_PYR_CD 

LABEL: Primary Payer Responsibility Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating the type of payer who has primary responsibility for the payment of the Medicare 
beneficiary's claims related to the stay (if not Medicare). 

SHORT NAME: PRPAY_CD 

LONG NAME: BENE_PRMRY_PYR_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: A = Employer group health plan (EGHP) insurance for an
